function_v0.doc:
Notification called by the vault after it has already transferred
tokens in. This function validates the caller is the vault but
performs no token transfers or internal bookkeeping (the vault
tracks balances via balance-differencing).

Zero-amount calls are no-ops (used for interface validation).
Negative amounts are rejected with `InvalidAmount`.
function_v0.name: deposit

cases.doc: Insufficient balance for the requested operation.
cases.name: InsufficientBalance

cases.doc: Target address is invalid for this operation (e.g. self or vault).
cases.name: InvalidTarget

cases.doc: New controller address is invalid (e.g. vault or this contract).
cases.name: InvalidController

function_v0.doc: Transfer up to `amount` of the asset back to the vault.\nReturns the actual amount transferred (capped by available balance).\nReturns 0 immediately for non-positive amounts (no auth required).
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc: The vault address that may call `deposit` / `withdraw`.
function_v0.name: get_vault

function_v0.doc: Idle token balance held by this contract (excludes deployed capital).
function_v0.name: get_balance

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the strategy.

* `asset`      \xe2\x80\x93 the token this strategy manages (e.g. XLM wrapper).
* `vault`      \xe2\x80\x93 the August vault address; only address that may
call `deposit` / `withdraw`.
* `controller` \xe2\x80\x93 the EOA (e.g. Utila wallet) that may call
`deploy_to_protocol` / `recall_from_protocol`.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc: The controller address that may call `deploy_to_protocol` / `recall_from_protocol`.
function_v0.name: get_controller

function_v0.doc: Rotate the controller address. Only the current controller may call.
function_v0.name: set_controller

function_v0.doc: Move funds from this strategy into an external protocol address.\nOnly the controller (e.g. Utila wallet) may call this.
function_v0.name: deploy_to_protocol

function_v0.doc: Bookkeeping estimate of funds currently deployed to external protocols.\nSaturates at zero; may not reflect yield accrued in protocols.
function_v0.name: get_deployed_total

function_v0.doc:
Pull funds back from an external protocol into this strategy.
Only the controller (e.g. Utila wallet) may call this.

This performs a simple SEP-41 token transfer from `protocol` to this
contract. The `protocol` address must authorize this transfer via
Soroban auth. For protocols requiring a custom withdrawal call,
replace the transfer with the protocol's client interface.

Note: `deployed_total` is a bookkeeping estimate that saturates at
zero. If the recalled amount exceeds `deployed_total` (e.g. due to
protocol yield), the counter floors at zero rather than going negative.
function_v0.name: recall_from_protocol
